name: Stytch
description: Stytch is a user authentication and identity platform. It lets you add passwordless login (magic links, OTPs), OAuth social logins, session management, and user CRUD to your application via simple API calls.

capabilities.name: send_magic_link
capabilities.description: Send a magic link to a user's email address for passwordless authentication. The user clicks the link to log in.

capabilities.name: authenticate_magic_link
capabilities.description: Verify a magic link token after the user clicks it. Returns a session token and user details on success.

capabilities.name: send_otp_sms
capabilities.description: Send a one-time passcode via SMS to a phone number. The user enters the code to authenticate.

capabilities.name: authenticate_otp
capabilities.description: Verify a one-time passcode that was sent via SMS or email. Returns session credentials on success.

capabilities.name: create_user
capabilities.description: Create a new user in your Stytch project with an email address and/or phone number.

capabilities.name: get_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user's profile by their user ID, including emails, phone numbers, and authentication factors.

capabilities.name: authenticate_session
capabilities.description: Validate and optionally extend an existing session using a session token or JWT.

capabilities.name: revoke_session
capabilities.description: Revoke an active session to log the user out. Accepts a session token, JWT, or user ID.
